nodes.title: USAGE AND MODES
widgets_values:
# ℹ️ Usage
1. Load desired (non-realistic) image
1. PUT DESIRED EYE COLOR IN THE EYE COLOR INPUT
1. Select mode below - make sure to bypass all except for the modes mentioned below
1. Generate til desired
1. Once desired, reuse seed
1. Enable Refiners
1. (Optional) Use Refiner FaceID
1. Generate til desired
1. Once desired, reuse seed
1. Enable detailers
1. (Optional) Enable Save
---

# ⚙️ MODES:

## 🗨️ PROMPT MODE (Let Tagger prompt for you):
### - IPAdapter (model/str/start/end): PLUS/.7/0/.5
#### Pros: Full realism with AI freedom based on the tagger output
#### Cons: Least accurate with image input but more creativity
---

## 🦅 FREEDOM MODE (Let AI do the work with IP Adapter):
### - IPAdapter (model/str/start/end): PLUS/.7/0/.5
#### Pros: Full realism with AI freedom but close to style and environment of the input image
#### Cons: Less accurate with image input
---

## 🖼️ COMPOSITION MODE (Realism with Composition retained):
### - IPAdapter (model/str/start/end): PLUS/.7/0/.5
### - CNet Tile (str/start/end): .4/0/.3-.5 (input dependent)
#### Pros: Realism while maintaining pose and outfit including colors
#### Cons: May introduce less realistic results depending on input image
---

## 👁️ ACCURATE MODE (Realism with Composition and Edges retained):
### - IPAdapter (model/str/start/end): PLUS/.7/0/.5
### - CNet Tile (str/start/end): .4/0/.3-.5 (input dependent)
### - CNet Canny (str/start/end): .3/0/.3-.5 (input dependent)
#### Pros: Same as composition but shows more resemblance to the input image
#### Cons: May be less realistic. Body shape or proportions might be retained making it less realistic
---

# 🙂 FACE IDs:

## 🤗 FACEID MODE (Set Image Switch to True):
### - IPAdapter (model/embeds/str/start/end): PLUS/average/.7/0/.5
### - FaceID (model/str/strfaceid/start/end): PLUSV2/.7/1.5/0/.9
### - CNet Tile (str/start/end): .4/0/.5
### - [Optional] CNet Canny (str/start/end): .3/0/.3
#### Pros: Realism with overall accuracy including face features and expressions
#### Cons: Less realistic; Doesn't work well with multiple faces.
---

## 🔁 FACESWAP MODE (Set Image Switch to False - Input dependent, best with closeup shots):
### NOTE: Better to load image focused on face. I usually search Google for an image of celebrity and take a square snip (Win + Shift + S) of it.
### - IPAdapter (model/str/start/end): PLUS/.8/0/.5
### - [Close Up] FaceID (model/type/str/strfaceid/start/end): PLUSV2/ease in/.8/5.0/0/.9-1 (1 if too weak)
### - [Midriff] FaceID (model/type/str/strfaceid/start/end): PORTRAIT UNNFORM/ease out/.8/5.0/0/1.0
### - [Optional] CNet Tile (str/start/end): .4/0/.3
### - [Optional] CNet Canny (str/start/end): .3/0/.3
#### Pros: Realistic, Face Swap
#### Cons: Hair color MAY be influenced by the face image input. Overall style are affected by input image. Doesn't work well with whole body shots or when main input face is small.
---

# 🗃️ OTHER Modes:

## 🎭 FACE ACCURACY MODE (Recommended for Face Accuracy):
### - IPAdapter (model/str/start/end): PLUS FACE/.8/0/.7
### - CNet Tile (str/start/end): .3/0/.5
#### Pros: Realism while maintaining pose and outfit
#### Cons: Outfit color and material might differ
---

## 🎯 PRECISION MODE (Full accuracy with input image - model and input dependent):
### - IPAdapter (model/str/start/end): PLUS/.7/0/.5
### CNet Tile (str/start/end): .3/0/.3
### CNet Canny/Depth (str/start/end): C=.3/0/.5; D=.3/0/.7
#### Pros: Normal realism with accurate to face, outfit, and style
#### Cons: Less realistic than other modes. Tends to generate 3D instead of realism if the input is too much cartoony. Eyes might also be bigger and away from normal human eye.
---

# 🖊️ NOTES:

## 🖖 HAND DETAILER NOTE:
### Only use this for hands that are not detailed enough. Aside from that, if the hands are already detailed, do not enable it, or if no hand are visible.

## 🎭 FACEID NOTE:
### Face Plus means focus on face. Portrait includes a bit of outside of face like hair and clothing.
---

## 🔴 IMPORTANT FOR FACEID:
### If FaceID fails to detect face, just disable it and rerun.

Follow Insightface installation from here ([Windows](https://github.com/cubiq/ComfyUI_IPAdapter_plus/issues/770))

For linux, just use comfy manager to install custom pip package. Type "insightface". If you face the security issue, just change the security to 'weak' in the config file of manager

nodes.title: README FIRST!!!
widgets_values:
## 📦 Download All Necessary Models & Loras

---

### 🔴 Main Pony Model  
`CyberRealistic Pony (Latest version recommended)`  
🔗 [Download Link](https://civitai.com/models/443821/cyberrealistic-pony)

🗂️ Place in: `ComfyUI/models/checkpoint`

---

### 🟣 LORAs 
`Amateur style - slider`  
🔗 [Download Link](https://civitai.com/api/download/models/1594293)

`Realistic Skin Texture style XL (Detailed Skin) + SD1.5 + Flux1D + Pony + Illu`  
🔗 [Download Link](https://civitai.com/api/download/models/1790871)

`[Optional] Point and Shoot - Pony Amateur Slider`  
🔗 [Download Link](https://civitai.com/api/download/models/1420899)

`Her eyes [Pony]`  
🔗 [Download Link](https://civitai.com/api/download/models/729864)

`ip-adapter-faceid-plusv2_sdxl_lora.safetensors`  
🔗 [Download Link](https://civitai.com/models/443821/cyberrealistic-pony)

🗂️ Place in: `ComfyUI/models/loras`

---

### 🟤 Embeddings 
`CyberRealistic Positive (Pony)`  
🔗 [Download Link](https://civitai.com/api/download/models/1477814)

🗂️ Place in: `ComfyUI/models/embeddings`

---

### 🔵 IPAdapter

#### Github: [Link](https://github.com/cubiq/ComfyUI_IPAdapter_plus)

`ip-adapter-plus-face_sdxl_vit-h.safetensors`  
🔗 [Download Link](https://huggingface.co/h94/IP-Adapter/resolve/main/sdxl_models/ip-adapter-plus-face_sdxl_vit-h.safetensors)

`ip-adapter-plus_sdxl_vit-h.safetensors`  
🔗 [Download Link](https://huggingface.co/h94/IP-Adapter/resolve/main/sdxl_models/ip-adapter-plus_sdxl_vit-h.safetensors)

`ip-adapter-faceid-plusv2_sdxl.bin`  
🔗 [Download Link](https://huggingface.co/h94/IP-Adapter-FaceID/resolve/main/ip-adapter-faceid-plusv2_sdxl.bin)

`ip-adapter-faceid-portrait_sdxl_unnorm.bin`  
🔗 [Download Link](https://huggingface.co/h94/IP-Adapter-FaceID/resolve/main/ip-adapter-faceid-portrait_sdxl_unnorm.bin)

🗂️ Place in: `ComfyUI/models/ipadapter`

`CLIP-ViT-H-14-laion2B-s32B-b79K.safetensors`  
🔗 [Download Link](https://huggingface.co/h94/IP-Adapter/resolve/main/models/image_encoder/model.safetensors)

🗂️ Place in: `ComfyUI/models/clip_vision`

---
### 🟢 ControlNet 
`controlnet-union-sdxl-1.0`  
🔗 [Download Link](https://huggingface.co/xinsir/controlnet-union-sdxl-1.0/resolve/main/diffusion_pytorch_model_promax.safetensors)

`controlnet-openpose-sdxl-1.0`  
🔗 [Download Link](https://huggingface.co/thibaud/controlnet-openpose-sdxl-1.0/resolve/main/OpenPoseXL2.safetensors)

🗂️ Place in: `ComfyUI/models/controlnet`

---
### 🟠 Upscaler Model 
`4x_NMKD-Siax_200k`  
🔗 [Download Link](https://huggingface.co/gemasai/4x_NMKD-Siax_200k/resolve/main/4x_NMKD-Siax_200k.pth)

🗂️ Place in: `ComfyUI/models/upscale_models`

---
### 🟠 OTHERS 
`Eyes.pt`  
🔗 [Download Link](https://civitai.com/api/download/models/168820)

🗂️ Place in: `ComfyUI/models/ultralytics/bbox`
